name: Allen Ginsberg
abstract: Irwin Allen Ginsberg (; June 3, 1926 – April 5, 1997) was an American poet and writer. As a student at Columbia University in the 1940s, he befriended Lucien Carr, William S.

concerts.label: Tibet House U.S. Benefit Concert

about_quotes.speaker: Warren Bernhardt
about_quotes.evidence: Kerouac was reading poetry every night and Ferlinghetti and Alan Ginsberg and I’m playing this piano with the legs burned off of it, and I’m right in the middle of this scene that she knows nothing about

about_quotes.speaker: Ingrid Sertso
about_quotes.evidence: Alan Ginsberg, William Burrows, I mean all these people were there. And Dave Holland. I mean we all went out there.
